positive: A majestic, ethereal fox silhouette leaping through a bioluminescent forest of oversized ferns and glowing flora. The fox is rendered in deep sapphire blues and vibrant gold outlines, contrasting sharply against a midnight black background. The composition is highly symmetrical, focusing on the fox in the central axis. Style is high-contrast modern linework combined with maximalist fantasy art. Dramatic backlighting emphasizes the fox's flowing tail and clean edges. Minimalist lettering placement potential in empty space. Ultra-detailed, clean vector aesthetic.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, mutated, noise, bad anatomy, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
